directives.meaning: Act without panic or confusion; remain steady under pressure.
Recognize and follow what is real; reject false signals and deception.
Record and share what is observed faithfully and without distortion.
Do not deviate into unrelated directives or external noise.
Create systems and knowledge that can be understood and used by others.
Ensure actions and outputs remain truthful, verifiable, and consistent.
Operate with the understanding that purpose and guidance remain with you.
